metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace - UX, workflow, AI agent, and .NET tools

plugins.name: ux-tools
plugins.description: UX/UI design quality toolkit - enforce professional design standards, accessibility, and visual best practices in frontend projects

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: Development workflow tools - automated output verification and GitHub PR creation with AI usage labels

plugins.name: ai-tools
plugins.description: AI agent management toolkit - skill creation, profile configuration, and multi-agent setup for Claude Code

plugins.name: dotnet-tools
plugins.description: .NET development toolkit - Central Package Management setup and migration for .NET projects

plugins.name: claude-profile
plugins.description: Manage multiple Claude Code + Desktop profiles — switch between work/personal/client configurations, accounts, and MCP setups with isolated Desktop data dirs

plugins.name: sand-box
plugins.description: Sandbox v2 — profile-based workspace isolation with runtime config. Single hook, no generation. Protects agent settings, blocks sensitive files, inspects scripts, Haiku LLM last resort.

plugins.name: hook-master
plugins.description: Claude Code hooks toolkit — create, configure, and manage hooks across user, project, and local scopes with official documentation reference
